language.title: App language
language.footer: The app UI will switch to the selected language immediately. Messages you send or receive are not translated.

securityNotifications.title: Security notifications
securityNotifications.subtitle: Get notified when a contact's security code has changed, or when your account is used on a new device.

changeNumber.title: Change number
changeNumber.alertBody:
Your account information, groups and messages will be moved to your new number.

Before proceeding, please ensure that you can receive SMS on your new number.

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.subtitle: Sign in with your fingerprint, face or device passcode

requestData.title: Request account info
requestData.subtitle: Create a report of your Whatchat account information

removeAccount.title: Remove account
removeAccount.subtitle: Deactivate your account (can be reactivated by signing in)

deleteAccount.title: Delete my account
deleteAccount.confirmBody:
Deleting your account will:

• Delete your account info and profile photo
• Delete you from all groups
• Delete your message history

This cannot be undone.
deleteAccount.scheduleBody: Your account will be deleted in 30 days. Sign in any time before then to cancel.

twoFactor.title: Two-step verification
twoFactor.authenticatorSubtitle: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or another TOTP app
twoFactor.emailSubtitle: We will email a 6-digit code each time you sign in
twoFactor.backupCodesIntro: Save these one-time codes somewhere safe. If you lose access to your authenticator, each code can be used once to sign in.
twoFactor.confirmDisableBody: We will email a confirmation code to your registered address to turn off two-step verification.
twoFactor.enterDisableCode: Enter the code we emailed you

changeEmail.title: Change email
changeEmail.intro: We will send a 6-digit code to the new address to confirm it belongs to you.
changeEmail.enterCode: Enter the code we sent to {{email}}

securityNotifications.title: Security notifications
securityNotifications.intro: Get an email when your account is accessed from a new device.

requestData.title: Request account info
requestData.intro: Generate a report of your account information — profile, contacts, groups and recent messages. We will email the file to your registered address when it's ready.
requestData.queued: Request queued. We'll email you when it's ready.
requestData.alreadyQueued: A report is already being prepared.
requestData.noEmail: Add an email to your account first.
requestData.noRequests: You haven't requested a report yet.

removeAccount.title: Remove account
removeAccount.intro:
Your account will be deactivated immediately. You will be signed out of all devices.

You can reactivate your account any time by signing in again.
removeAccount.scheduleIntro: Or schedule permanent deletion in 30 days (you can cancel before then):

passkeys.title: Passkeys
passkeys.comingSoonBody: Sign in without a password using your fingerprint, face, or device passcode. We are working on it — check back in a future update.
